sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101511" key="susfhko/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συσφηκόω</orth>, <sense id="n101511.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">join closely together</tr_>, Timo <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">24</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
